title: ParseError->SieveError kind heuristic unexplained
description: parse_error.rs From<ParseError> for SieveError: the impl determines Lex vs Parse kind by checking e.line.is_some(). This is a subtle heuristic (lexer sets line positions, form parser never does) that is documented in the ParseError struct doc comment but NOT in the From impl itself. A contributor reading only the impl block will not understand why line presence maps to Lex. Add a one-line comment in the From impl explaining the invariant.
